PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?numRaces WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P31 wd:Q630714 ; wdt:P350 wd:Q403 ; wdt:P410 ?numRaces .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?numRaces)
OFFSET 2
LIMIT 1

Thus, the answer is **17**.
